title: myosotis alpestris var. albicans
intro: Myosotis alpestris var. albicans, also known as Alpine Forget-me-not, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to reduce pain and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Alpine Forget-me-not include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, such as insomnia and digestive disorders.
